subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-25 in London
subcodes.first_line: One's insistent self.  Were you to leave a child to persist in his natural state, he would develop a character that is reprehensible and fiendish
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفس امارهٴ انسان اگر اطفال را بحال طبیعی بگذارید اخلاق جمیع مذموم و شیطانی شود
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @need for an educator
